name: Model
positive_prompt: An 18-year-old young woman, 1.68m tall, with a youthful appearance and a sweet, innocent, angelic face; fair skin; short, straight blonde hair in a tousled, layered style that gives her a natural, messy look. She has medium-sized breasts, a slim waist, and an hourglass figure; her light green, almond-shaped eyes are accentuated by thick black lashes and dramatic makeup, complemented by light blush; medium height, well-proportioned body; excellent quality, realistic
negative_prompt: dark hair, brown eyes, blue eyes, overweight, obese, old, elderly, wrinkles, aged, ugly, deformed, bad anatomy, bad hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, signature
